name: skills
description: Official Claude Skills collection from Posit (makers of RStudio, Shiny, Quarto). Covers critical code review, PR automation, R package development, Shiny app development, Quarto authoring, brand styling, and open-source release workflows.
scan_summary: Official skills from Posit (a well-known enterprise open-source company behind RStudio). MIT licensed. Skills are SKILL.md files with clean metadata. Includes a Python utility (count-skill-tokens.py) for tooling only. PR automation skill (pr-create) interfaces with GitHub Actions and CI — legitimate use. .claude-plugin marketplace format properly used. Contributes to open-source release workflows (changelog, blog posts).

findings_summary.notes: High-quality, professionally maintained skills from a trusted open-source organization. Clean SKILL.md structure with good documentation. The pr-create skill monitors GitHub CI and debugs failures — this is expected behavior for a PR automation skill, not a concern. Well-organized domain structure (posit-dev, r-lib, shiny, quarto, brand-yml, open-source). No security concerns.
